home.title: OpenDocs
home.empty_state:
No files yet.
Tap + to open a document.
home.action_card_desc:
PDF, HWP, Word, images and more —
open any document instantly.
home.favorites_empty:
No starred files yet.
Tap ☆ on a file to pin it here.
home.guide_formats_desc: PDF · HWP · Word · Excel · EPUB · Images

viewer.hwp_partial_warning: Complex layouts (tables, images) may appear in simplified text mode.
viewer.print_via_share: Use the 'Print' option from the share menu for this format.
viewer.print_unsupported: Printing is not supported on this device.
viewer.share_unsupported: Sharing is not supported on this device.

favorites.title: Favorites
favorites.empty_state:
No favorites yet.
Star a file to pin it here.

files.title: Files
files.empty_state:
No files opened yet.
Tap + to open your first document.
files.delete_title: Remove this file from the list?
files.delete_desc: Only the entry is removed. The actual file is untouched.

settings.title: Settings
settings.privacy_note: All files are processed locally on your device. Nothing is uploaded to any server.
settings.clear_cache_desc: Recent files and favorites are kept. Only temporary files will be removed.
settings.formats_desc: Open these formats locally — fully offline.

error.render_failed: This file couldn't be rendered. For complex layouts, try opening on a PC.
error.hwp_render_failed: This HWP file couldn't be rendered. Complex layouts with tables or images may not display correctly. Try opening on a PC with Hancom Office.
error.docx_render_failed: This document couldn't be fully rendered. Complex layouts may appear in simplified text mode.
error.epub_render_failed: This EPUB file couldn't be opened. The file may be DRM-protected or corrupted.
error.file_not_found: File not found. It may have been moved or deleted.
error.format_unsupported: This file format is not supported. Supported formats: PDF, HWP, HWPX, DOCX, PPTX, XLSX, EPUB, TXT, and images.
error.web_mobile_only_title: Open this format in the mobile app
error.web_mobile_only_desc:
{{format}} files only work in the mobile app (iOS/Android).
On the web, only PDF, XLSX, DOCX, images, and text are supported.
error.render_failed_web: This file cannot be displayed. It may be corrupted or too large.

onboarding.title:
All Standard Documents.
In One App.
onboarding.privacy_promise: Your files never leave your device.
onboarding.no_account_needed: No account. No sign-up. 100% on-device processing.
